choices: linear switched (also called linear sequential) array transducer

prompt: These transducer systems typically produce an image that, throughout its entire depth, is approximately as wide as the ultrasound transducer itself.
choices: linear switched (also called linear sequential) array transducer

choices: linear switched (also called linear sequential) array transducer

prompt: A special sector shape is produced when this transducer is used. It looks like a wedge or a slice of pie, but it doesn’t originate at a point. The sector has a blunted, curved shape at the top. The arc at the top of the image may be a few centimeters wide.
choices: linear switched (also called linear sequential) array transducer

prompt: These transducers produce a sector-shaped (wedge-shaped) image that may originate from a small or point-like region depending on the design.
choices: linear switched (also called linear sequential) array transducer

prompt: With these transducers, a trapezoidal image shape is produced. The image is flat at the top and becomes progressively wider at increasing depths.
choices: linear switched (also called linear sequential) array transducer
